mapper.sql: invitation.invitation_id, invitation.project_id, invitation.plan_id, invitation.tenant_id, invitation.supplier_dept_id, supplier.legal_name AS supplier_name, invitation.invited_by_user_id, invitation.deadline, invitation.status, invitation.invitation_round, invitation.invitation_type, invitation.revision_reason, invitation.sent_at, invitation.responded_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, plan_id) latest.* FROM t_repair_project_quote_invitation latest WHERE latest.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND latest.supplier_dept_id = #{supplierDeptId} AND latest.status IN ('PENDING', 'SUBMITTED') ORDER BY project_id, plan_id, invitation_round DESC, invitation_id DESC ) invitation JOIN t_repair_project project ON project.project_id = invitation.project_id AND project.tenant_id = invitation.tenant_id AND project.status IN ('DRAFT', 'PLAN_LOCKED') JOIN t_repair_plan_version plan ON plan.plan_id = invitation.plan_id AND plan.project_id = invitation.project_id AND plan.status = 'DRAFT' JOIN t_supplier_org_profile supplier ON supplier.supplier_dept_id = invitation.supplier_dept_id ORDER BY invitation.sent_at DESC, invitation.invitation_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_repair_project_supplier_quote ( project_id, plan_id, tenant_id, supplier_dept_id, supplier_name, quote_amount, quote_summary, attachment_id, attachment_hash, submitted_by_user_id, submitted_by_role_key, submission_source, confirmation_status, original_source, quote_status, revision_no ) VALUES ( #{projectId}, #{planId}, #{tenantId}, #{supplierDeptId}, #{supplierName}, #{quoteAmount}, #{quoteSummary}, #{attachmentId}, #{attachmentHash}, #{submittedByUserId}, #{submittedByRoleKey}, #{submissionSource}, #{confirmationStatus}, #{originalSource}, #{quoteStatus}, #{revisionNo} )
mapper.sql: quote_id, project_id, plan_id, tenant_id, supplier_dept_id, supplier_name, quote_amount, quote_summary, attachment_id, attachment_hash, submitted_by_user_id, submitted_by_role_key, submission_source, confirmation_status, original_source, quote_status, revision_no, superseded_by_quote_id, create_time
mapper.update: UPDATE t_repair_project_supplier_quote SET quote_status = 'REVISION_REQUESTED' WHERE quote_id = #{quoteId} AND quote_status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.select: SELECT selection.selection_id, selection.project_id, selection.plan_id, selection.tenant_id, selection.quote_id, selection.supplier_dept_id, selection.supplier_name, selection.quote_amount, selection.selection_method, selection.recommendation_reason, selection.insufficient_quote_reason, selection.framework_relation_id, selection.recommended_by_user_id, selection.create_time FROM t_repair_project_supplier_selection selection JOIN t_repair_project_supplier_quote quote ON quote.quote_id = selection.quote_id AND quote.project_id = selection.project_id AND quote.plan_id = selection.plan_id AND quote.tenant_id = selection.tenant_id WHERE selection.project_id = #{projectId} AND selection.plan_id = #{planId} AND selection.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND quote.quote_status = 'ACTIVE' AND quote.confirmation_status IN ('ONLINE_CONFIRMED', 'OFFLINE_EVIDENCE_VERIFIED', 'CONTRACT_CONFIRMED') ORDER BY selection.create_time DESC, selection.selection_id DESC LIMIT 1
